overall.description: A cinematic Unreal Engine 5 gameplay sequence showing a first-person exploration of a foggy, snow-dusted gothic graveyard at night. The player ascends stone stairs, passes an NPC character, and walks through atmospheric tombstones to approach ornate mausoleums with dramatic lantern lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered stone stairway with wall-mounted lanterns

events.description: NPC character descends the stairs and runs past the camera

agents.ego_description: climbing the steep stone staircase flanked by high walls, approaching the upper graveyard

notable_agents.action: descending the stairs and running past the player toward the bottom

entered.detail: wide stone steps with snow dusting the edges, leading upward between walls
tall stone retaining wall with rough texture
tall stone retaining wall matching the left side
warm glowing lantern mounted on the left wall, casting orange light
snow-capped building roof visible at the top of the stairs against dark sky

segments.scene_description: The segment opens at the bottom of a stone staircase enclosed by high walls. The player ascends the snow-dusted steps, passing a warm lantern on the left wall. At approximately 6.5 seconds, an NPC character descends and runs past the player, continuing down the stairs as the player reaches the top.

scene_state.functional_zone: open graveyard path with scattered winter trees

agents.ego_description: walking across the snowy grass toward a large central tree and distant tomb structures

entered.detail: snow-patched grass and dirt ground covering the graveyard floor
massive bare tree with sprawling branches silhouetted against the foggy sky
small warm lights glowing in the distance marking other graveyard structures

segments.scene_description: Exiting the stairway, the scene opens into a wide, foggy graveyard with snow-patched grass underfoot. The player walks toward a large central tree in the distance, with stone walls now far to the left and distant lanterns twinkling through the haze. The atmosphere is desolate and quiet.

scene_state.functional_zone: gothic mausoleum complex with ornate tombstones under tree canopy

events.description: approaching the stone tombs and entering the mausoleum area under the large tree

agents.ego_description: exploring the graveyard interior, examining ornate tombstones and approaching the gothic mausoleum entrance

entered.detail: decorative stone grave marker with carved details, situated under the tree
stone memorial bench beside the path
large stone mausoleum with pointed gothic arch and snow-covered roof
tall stone monument with rounded archway top
small gothic structure with triangular roof and wooden door

segments.scene_description: The player moves under the canopy of the large tree into a dense cluster of monuments. Ornate tombstones and a stone bench appear beside the path. The camera approaches a prominent gothic mausoleum with a pointed arch doorway, passing a stone arch monument on the left and a small shrine on the right, ending at the mausoleum entrance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a confined stone passageway into the expansive, desolate depths of a gothic graveyard. It begins with an ascent up snow-dusted stairs enclosed by high walls, passing a warm lantern just as an NPC character runs past in the opposite direction. As the player reaches the top, the scene opens into a wide, foggy expanse of snow-patched grass where distant lanterns twinkle through a thick haze. The camera then moves toward a large central tree, transitioning from the open field into a dense cluster of ornate tombstones and stone benches. Finally, the path leads past a stone arch and a small shrine before coming to a halt at the pointed arch doorway of a prominent gothic mausoleum.
